mapper.sql: t1.ID, t1.YEAR, t1.MERITS, t1.TYPE, t1.POSITION, t1.CREATED_BY, t1.CREATION_DATE, t1.LAST_UPDATED_BY, t1.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, t1.LAST_UPDATE_IP, t1.VERSION, t1.ORG_IDENTITY, t1.CREATED_DEPT, t1.ATTRIBUTE_01, t1.ATTRIBUTE_02, t1.ATTRIBUTE_03, t1.ATTRIBUTE_04, t1.ATTRIBUTE_05, t1.ATTRIBUTE_06, t1.ATTRIBUTE_07, t1.ATTRIBUTE_08, t1.ATTRIBUTE_09, t1.ATTRIBUTE_10, t1.ATTRIBUTE_11, t1.ATTRIBUTE_12, t1.ATTRIBUTE_13, t1.ATTRIBUTE_14, t1.ATTRIBUTE_15, t1.ATTRIBUTE_16, t1.ATTRIBUTE_17, t1.ATTRIBUTE_18, t1.ATTRIBUTE_19, t1.ATTRIBUTE_20, t1.PA_ID
mapper.select:
select
from (select * from ACTIVIST_MERITS t where t.PA_ID=#{bean.paId}) t1
from ACTIVIST_MERITS t1

select
from (select * from ACTIVIST_MERITS t where t.PA_ID=#{bean.paId}) t1
from ACTIVIST_MERITS t1

select
from ACTIVIST_MERITS t1
and t1.id in
#{item}
order by t1.creation_date desc
mapper.insert:
insert into ACTIVIST_MERITS
ID,
YEAR,
MERITS,
TYPE,
POSITION,
CREATED_BY,
CREATION_DATE,
LAST_UPDATED_BY,
LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
LAST_UPDATE_IP,
VERSION,
ORG_IDENTITY,
CREATED_DEPT,
ATTRIBUTE_01,
ATTRIBUTE_02,
ATTRIBUTE_03,
ATTRIBUTE_04,
ATTRIBUTE_05,
ATTRIBUTE_06,
ATTRIBUTE_07,
ATTRIBUTE_08,
ATTRIBUTE_09,
ATTRIBUTE_10,
ATTRIBUTE_11,
ATTRIBUTE_12,
ATTRIBUTE_13,
ATTRIBUTE_14,
ATTRIBUTE_15,
ATTRIBUTE_16,
ATTRIBUTE_17,
ATTRIBUTE_18,
ATTRIBUTE_19,
ATTRIBUTE_20,
PA_ID,
#{id,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{year,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
#{merits,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{type,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{position,jdbcType = DECIMAL},
#{createdBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{creationDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
#{lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{lastUpdateDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
#{lastUpdateIp,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{version,jdbcType = DECIMAL},
#{orgIdentity,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{createdDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attribute01,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attribute02,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attribute03,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attribute04,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attribute05,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attribute06,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attribute07,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attribute08,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attribute09,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attribute10,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attribute11,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
#{attribute12,jdbcType = DECIMAL},
#{attribute13,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attribute14,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attribute15,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
#{attribute16,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attribute17,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attribute18,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attribute19,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attribute20,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{paId,jdbcType = VARCHAR},

insert into ACTIVIST_MERITS( ID , YEAR , MERITS , TYPE , POSITION , CREATED_BY , CREATION_DATE , LAST_UPDATED_BY , LAST_UPDATE_DATE , LAST_UPDATE_IP , VERSION , ORG_IDENTITY , CREATED_DEPT , ATTRIBUTE_01 , ATTRIBUTE_02 , ATTRIBUTE_03 , ATTRIBUTE_04 , ATTRIBUTE_05 , ATTRIBUTE_06 , ATTRIBUTE_07 , ATTRIBUTE_08 , ATTRIBUTE_09 , ATTRIBUTE_10 , ATTRIBUTE_11 , ATTRIBUTE_12 , ATTRIBUTE_13 , ATTRIBUTE_14 , ATTRIBUTE_15 , ATTRIBUTE_16 , ATTRIBUTE_17 , ATTRIBUTE_18 , ATTRIBUTE_19 , ATTRIBUTE_20 , PA_ID )
select #{item.id,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.year,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , #{item.merits,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.type,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.position,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , #{item.createdBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.creationDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , #{item.lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.lastUpdateDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , #{item.lastUpdateIp,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.version,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , #{item.orgIdentity,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.createdDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attribute01,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attribute02,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attribute03,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attribute04,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attribute05,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attribute06,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attribute07,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attribute08,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attribute09,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attribute10,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attribute11,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , #{item.attribute12,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , #{item.attribute13,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attribute14,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attribute15,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , #{item.attribute16,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attribute17,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attribute18,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attribute19,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attribute20,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.paId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} from dual
mapper.update:
update ACTIVIST_MERITS
ID = #{id,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
YEAR = #{year,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
MERITS = #{merits,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
TYPE = #{type,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
POSITION = #{position,jdbcType = DECIMAL},
CREATED_BY = #{createdBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
CREATION_DATE = #{creationDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
LAST_UPDATED_BY = #{lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
LAST_UPDATE_DATE = #{lastUpdateDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
LAST_UPDATE_IP = #{lastUpdateIp,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
VERSION = version+1,
ORG_IDENTITY = #{orgIdentity,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
CREATED_DEPT = #{createdDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTRIBUTE_01 = #{attribute01,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTRIBUTE_02 = #{attribute02,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTRIBUTE_03 = #{attribute03,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTRIBUTE_04 = #{attribute04,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTRIBUTE_05 = #{attribute05,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTRIBUTE_06 = #{attribute06,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTRIBUTE_07 = #{attribute07,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTRIBUTE_08 = #{attribute08,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTRIBUTE_09 = #{attribute09,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTRIBUTE_10 = #{attribute10,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTRIBUTE_11 = #{attribute11,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
ATTRIBUTE_12 = #{attribute12,jdbcType = DECIMAL},
ATTRIBUTE_13 = #{attribute13,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTRIBUTE_14 = #{attribute14,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTRIBUTE_15 = #{attribute15,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
ATTRIBUTE_16 = #{attribute16,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTRIBUTE_17 = #{attribute17,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTRIBUTE_18 = #{attribute18,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTRIBUTE_19 = #{attribute19,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTRIBUTE_20 = #{attribute20,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
PA_ID = #{paId,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
where id = #{id} and version = #{version}

update ACTIVIST_MERITS set ID = #{id,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , YEAR = #{year,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , MERITS = #{merits,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , TYPE = #{type,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , POSITION = #{position,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , CREATED_BY = #{createdBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CREATION_DATE = #{creationDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , LAST_UPDATED_BY = #{lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , LAST_UPDATE_DATE = #{lastUpdateDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , LAST_UPDATE_IP = #{lastUpdateIp,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , VERSION = version+1 , ORG_IDENTITY = #{orgIdentity,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CREATED_DEPT = #{createdDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_01 = #{attribute01,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_02 = #{attribute02,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_03 = #{attribute03,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_04 = #{attribute04,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_05 = #{attribute05,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_06 = #{attribute06,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_07 = #{attribute07,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_08 = #{attribute08,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_09 = #{attribute09,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_10 = #{attribute10,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_11 = #{attribute11,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , ATTRIBUTE_12 = #{attribute12,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , ATTRIBUTE_13 = #{attribute13,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_14 = #{attribute14,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_15 = #{attribute15,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , ATTRIBUTE_16 = #{attribute16,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_17 = #{attribute17,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_18 = #{attribute18,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_19 = #{attribute19,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_20 = #{attribute20,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , PA_ID = #{paId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} where id = #{id} and version = #{version}

update.foreach: update ACTIVIST_MERITS set ID = #{item.id,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , YEAR = #{item.year,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , MERITS = #{item.merits,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , TYPE = #{item.type,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , POSITION = #{item.position,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , CREATED_BY = #{item.createdBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CREATION_DATE = #{item.creationDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , LAST_UPDATED_BY = #{item.lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , LAST_UPDATE_DATE = #{item.lastUpdateDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , LAST_UPDATE_IP = #{item.lastUpdateIp,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , VERSION = version+1 , ORG_IDENTITY = #{item.orgIdentity,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CREATED_DEPT = #{item.createdDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_01 = #{item.attribute01,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_02 = #{item.attribute02,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_03 = #{item.attribute03,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_04 = #{item.attribute04,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_05 = #{item.attribute05,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_06 = #{item.attribute06,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_07 = #{item.attribute07,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_08 = #{item.attribute08,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_09 = #{item.attribute09,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_10 = #{item.attribute10,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_11 = #{item.attribute11,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , ATTRIBUTE_12 = #{item.attribute12,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , ATTRIBUTE_13 = #{item.attribute13,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_14 = #{item.attribute14,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_15 = #{item.attribute15,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , ATTRIBUTE_16 = #{item.attribute16,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_17 = #{item.attribute17,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_18 = #{item.attribute18,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_19 = #{item.attribute19,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_20 = #{item.attribute20,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , PA_ID = #{item.paId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} where id = #{item.id} and version = #{item.version}
